research_engine_handoff_brief.premise: This system is public-data-first, point-in-time, research-governed investment intelligence—not a generic AI stock picker. Optimize for economic interpretation power.

next_build_agenda.hypothesis_forge: Turn stable joined recipe rows into testable hypotheses with explicit PIT windows and falsifiers.
next_build_agenda.pit_validation_lab: Replay joins under alternate as-of and score-run boundaries; document join_key_mismatch vs not_built separation.
next_build_agenda.adversarial_peer_review: Challenge factor coverage, excess definitions, and state_change lag assumptions.
next_build_agenda.promotion_gate: Only promote signals that survive documented data lineage and thin-input gates.
next_build_agenda.residual_memory_casebook: Keep registry tail, GIS misses, and immature NQ rows as explicit deferred cases—not noise.
next_build_agenda.user_facing_explanation_layer: Expose why-investors-should-care narratives tied to evidence bundles, not black-box scores.

explicit_non_goals: Broad filing-index or raw-facts campaigns as headline work
Threshold relaxation or production scoring logic changes without governance
Large GIS concept-map expansion in the same sprint as substrate closure

phase37.rationale: Public-core substrate sufficient for MVP freeze; primary energy to hypothesis forge, PIT lab, promotion gate, casebook, explanation layer.
